title: WD-40 Multi Use Lubricant Spray 100ml Pocket Size Original, Multipurpose WD40 Spray Lubricant for Maintenance, Water Displacement, and Rust Protection for Emergency Repairs and Travel
features: 5-in-1 Protection Formula: Penetrates stuck parts, lubricates moving components, provides corrosion and rust protection for metal, while displacing moisture and cleaning surfaces, making the WD40 multi use spray your complete toolbox solution.

Classic Reliable Application: Trusted spray nozzle delivers consistent lubricant spray coverage for quick fixes anywhere, ensuring this portable spray oil provides professional results without complicated mechanisms or lost parts.

Cleans Without Attracting Dirt: Unlike ordinary maintenance spray, our formula removes grime while actively repelling dust buildup, making it the perfect squeaky door oil that keeps hinges clean plus essential bike lubricant.

100ml Ultimate Portability: Pocket-sized anti rust spray for metal fits gloveboxes, toolboxes, desk drawers, and backpacks, this multipurpose lubricating spray ensures professional maintenance capability wherever problems arise.

Trusted Toolbox Essential Since 1953: Professional-grade light lubricant proven across 2000+ documented uses, and our original water resistant lubricant spray formula protects in temperatures from -45°C to 150°C for reliable performance.

Not For Specialist Tasks: While excellent for general maintenance, this isn't a dedicated rust remover spray, heavy penetrating spray, bike chain oil, chain cleaner, or brake component lubricant; choose WD-40 Specialist for those needs.
